description: First Call to Arms patch introducing Crystal League reward updates, Faction Warfare rebalancing, Hellgate matchmaking changes, and numerous fixes.

sections.heading: Guild Season Winner Statues Added
sections.description: New commemorative statues and furniture items.
items: Black 0rder statue added to Conquerors' Hall
Top 3 guild statues now placeable as furniture
sections.searchable_text: guild season statues black order conquerors hall furniture

sections.heading: 20v20 Crystal League Changes
items: Level 2+ rewards now include artifacts
Winning teams guaranteed artifacts
Level 3 chests contain roughly double artifacts vs Level 2
Teams can start with 15+ players instead of exactly 20
Match UI now shows ready players
No-show rewards increased from 60% to 80% of Season Points
sections.searchable_text: crystal league rewards artifacts 20v20 no show

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes
items: Reduced points from PvP kills
Increased total points available in the system
Daily bonus requirements reduced by 75%
Campaign milestone requirements reduced by 50%
Adjusted bonus point gain/loss rates
sections.searchable_text: faction warfare points bonuses campaign requirements

sections.heading: Hellgate Changes
items: Reduced matchmaking selectivity for high infamy teams
10v10 lethal IP requirement reduced from 1200 to 1100
Hellgate map entrance duration reduced from 60 to 20 minutes
sections.searchable_text: hellgate matchmaking infamy ip requirement duration

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Duel UI updated with improved opponent info display
Mobile scrolling improvements
Mobile wardrobe optimization

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Marketplace pagination restored
Faction Points now correctly affected by modifiers
Premium Faction Points count toward rewards
Item recovery works for 20v20 battlevaults
Hideout overcrowded cluster skip fixed
Energy Manipulator UI display fixed
Loadout transfer issue fixed
Faction PvE buff reapplication fixed
Spell descriptions added for fish foods
Various ability and mob behavior fixes
Mobile control and dismount fixes
Multiple graphical, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes marketplace faction points battlevaults hideout ui loadout mobile
